theme: 一盘钢笔尖、吸墨纸和黄铜镇尺，为什么越来越多人想把写字这件事过成一套随身 EDC 礼仪

items.source: 01_皮笔袋旁摊开的钢笔尖和吸墨纸.png
items.title: 皮笔袋旁摊开的钢笔尖和吸墨纸
items.description: 一摊开就能看出写字不是效率工具，而是一整套被精心挑选过的随身礼仪。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, fountain pen nibs, blotting paper, and a leather pen pouch spread on a desk, tactile brass and paper textures, Xiaohongshu-worthy stationary EDC atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_黄铜镇尺压住一页刚写完的信纸.png
items.title: 黄铜镇尺压住一页刚写完的信纸
items.description: 黄铜压在纸页上的重量，会让人立刻相信有人真的认真对待每一次落笔。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a brass paperweight holding down a freshly written letter sheet, elegant analog writing ritual, warm desk light, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_晨光里排开的三枚不同笔尖.png
items.title: 晨光里排开的三枚不同笔尖
items.description: 同样是钢笔尖，排开的差别本身就足够构成成年人的器物偏好。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, three different fountain pen nibs lined up in morning side light, macro metal detail, collector-like arrangement, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_吸墨纸边缘留下深浅不同的墨迹.png
items.title: 吸墨纸边缘留下深浅不同的墨迹
items.description: 吸墨纸上那点不均匀的墨色，比任何教程都更像真实写字生活。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, blotting paper edges stained with varying ink tones, intimate analog stationery realism, close-up texture, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_办公桌角落的一支钢笔和一块旧镇尺.png
items.title: 办公桌角落的一支钢笔和一块旧镇尺
items.description: 一支钢笔和一块旧镇尺放在桌角，会让整个工位突然像有了人物设定。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a single fountain pen and an aged brass paperweight at the corner of an office desk, understated literary EDC mood, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_拆开的墨水瓶旁放着待擦拭的笔尖.png
items.title: 拆开的墨水瓶旁放着待擦拭的笔尖
items.description: 真正会上瘾的不是字，而是每次写前写后那种必须照顾器物的手感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, opened ink bottle beside fountain pen nibs ready to be wiped, realistic maintenance ritual, brass and glass textures, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_旅途中收进笔盒的一套随身写字工具.png
items.title: 旅途中收进笔盒的一套随身写字工具
items.description: 随身带着这一套的人，想晒的往往不是文具，而是一种生活秩序。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a travel pen case packed with fountain pen, blotting paper, and brass accessories, organized writing EDC kit, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_旧书页上临时试写的一排墨线.png
items.title: 旧书页上临时试写的一排墨线
items.description: 试写的那几条墨线，会让桌面看起来像一场安静但有标准的仪式。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, test ink lines on an old book page beside a fountain pen nib, literary stationery setup, warm realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_木托盘里分类放好的笔尖和镇尺.png
items.title: 木托盘里分类放好的笔尖和镇尺
items.description: 分类摆好的器物最容易让人停下来看，因为秩序本身就有保存欲。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, fountain pen nibs and brass paperweights organized by type in a wooden tray, collector order and tactile beauty, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_夜灯下擦拭笔尖的手和白棉布.png
items.title: 夜灯下擦拭笔尖的手和白棉布
items.description: 擦拭笔尖的动作很像收心，适合做一组图里最有情绪的结尾段。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, hands wiping a fountain pen nib with white cotton cloth under a warm night lamp, intimate ritual ending, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_会议前放在笔记本上的钢笔和吸墨纸.png
items.title: 会议前放在笔记本上的钢笔和吸墨纸
items.description: 开会前先摆好钢笔和吸墨纸的人，连工作状态都像被重新装帧过。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, fountain pen and blotting paper placed on a notebook before a meeting, polished analog work ritual, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_收纳盒里并排躺着的金银双色笔尖.png
items.title: 收纳盒里并排躺着的金银双色笔尖
items.description: 最后收回盒子里的金属光泽，会让这套写字 EDC 像一种微型收藏。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, gold and silver fountain pen nibs resting side by side in a storage box, reflective metal detail, collector ending frame, no logos, no readable text.
